evaluation_method: Translation benchmarks from the GPT-3 paper evaluated via log-likelihood scoring. The GPT-3 paper evaluated translation on WMT'14 Fr-En/En-Fr and WMT'16 De-En/En-De/Ro-En/En-Ro datasets. In the log-likelihood evaluation setting (as opposed to generation-based), the model scores candidate translations by computing their log-probabilities rather than generating translations freely. BLEU scores were computed using multi-bleu.perl with XLM's tokenization for comparison with prior unsupervised NMT work. This evaluator uses log-likelihood ranking rather than free generation.
